metadata.title: Isabela Rodríguez Rocha | IRR
metadata.description: Recent Computing graduate building digital experiences through intentional code and curated architecture.

hero.description: Recent Computing graduate passionate about building clean, purposeful software. Turning ideas into real products.

about.subtitle: Software Developer // 2026
about.description: Recent graduate eager to grow in the software industry. Focused on building practical, well-crafted applications with modern tools.
about.academicDescription: My work is grounded in formal computational theory and system engineering principles learned at one of Central America's top universities.
about.degreeDescription: Specialized in software development, covering algorithmic efficiency, software architecture, and user-centric design. Completed research in integrated software systems and cloud infrastructure.

items.title: Supervised Professional Practice
items.description: Collaborated with a team to build internal software tools for a non-profit organization, improving data management and streamlining daily operations. Gained hands-on experience in full-stack development, agile workflows, and delivering solutions aligned with real user needs.

items.title: Computer Technician
items.description: Provided technical support to individuals and small businesses, handling hardware repairs, software installations, and network setup. Developed strong diagnostic skills and the ability to explain technical concepts in accessible language.

items.title: CAD Designer
items.description: Designed personalized dental treatment plans using specialized CAD software, crafting precise 3D models to guide orthodontic care. Strengthened my attention to detail, spatial reasoning, and ability to deliver high-quality work within tight deadlines.

projects.title: IsaStore CR
projects.description: A fully deployed e-commerce web application built with modern web technologies.

projects.title: Maquiz CR
projects.description: An interactive web application deployed on Vercel with a focus on user experience.

experience.developmentDesc: Building server-side logic and interactive front-end environments with modern frameworks.
experience.designDesc: From technical drafting to modern interface aesthetics with precision geometry.
experience.hardwareDesc: Ensuring the physical infrastructure sustains the digital vision reliably.

skills.title: Technical
skills.subtitle: Building scalable applications and leveraging intelligent tools within the digital void.
skills.techSupportDesc: Hands-on experience diagnosing and resolving hardware and software issues. Skilled in system maintenance, network setup, and technical problem-solving to keep operations running smoothly.
